expectations.text: Skill defines and scripts can create a durable `深度调研/{date}-{topic}` workspace with required files and directories.
expectations.evidence: `SKILL.md` contains Workspace Setup; `scripts/init_workspace.py` creates 研究计划.md, 资料索引.md, 阶段日志.md and required directories.

expectations.text: Skill includes a source-index workflow and helper script that records source type, link/path, evidence level, reading status, value, and notes.
expectations.evidence: `scripts/add_source.py` appends rows with type, name, link, evidence, status, value, and note fields.

expectations.text: Skill includes templates or scripts for project notes and paper notes that require judgments, evidence, and uncertainty sections.
expectations.evidence: `scripts/create_note.py` creates project and paper notes with sections such as 核心抽象, 工程启发, 值得借鉴, 避免照搬, 不确定/待验证.

expectations.text: Skill defines evidence levels and requires uncertain claims to be marked as 待验证/不确定.
expectations.evidence: `SKILL.md` Evidence Rules define A/B/C/D levels and require missing evidence to be marked 待验证/不确定.

expectations.text: Skill provides a quality/completion gate and a script that can check minimum workspace completeness.
expectations.evidence: `SKILL.md` Completion Gate references `scripts/check_quality.py`; smoke test passed 9/9 checks.

expectations.text: Skill explicitly excludes git push, external publishing, messages, and external write APIs from default research behavior.
expectations.evidence: `SKILL.md` Safety boundary states not to push to GitHub, publish content, send messages, or write to external services as part of this skill.

expectations.text: Repository contains at least one compact real example that demonstrates research plan, source index, per-source notes, and synthesis.
expectations.evidence: At the start of iteration-1, `examples/` only contained a placeholder README. This drives the next implementation step.

eval_feedback.overall: The skill has a productized structure and useful scripts, but lacks a compact real example and formal independent with-skill/baseline execution outputs.

suggestions.assertion: Repository contains at least one compact real example that demonstrates research plan, source index, per-source notes, and synthesis.
suggestions.reason: A mature skill needs a visible example so users can understand expected outputs without running a long task.
Add a stage-log helper because stage updates are central to long-running research but currently must be edited manually.
Strengthen quality checking to detect whether final synthesis documents exist, not only the base workspace files.
